resumo: Talking about school places helps students describe spaces from everyday life in English.
Simple instructions support communication in routines and classroom situations.
This topic makes language use more practical and contextualized.

explicacao.texto: Words such as classroom, library, cafeteria, corridor and playground help students identify and talk about familiar places. This vocabulary is useful in everyday school communication.
explicacao.dica: Connect the words to the real places you know in your school.

explicacao.texto: Understanding simple instructions helps students follow routines, ask for help and move around spaces more confidently. Clear commands and location expressions are part of basic interaction.
explicacao.dica: Practice short instructions together with place vocabulary.

exemplos.enunciado: Read: 'Go to the library and wait near the door.'
passos: Identify the place mentioned in the sentence.
Observe the simple instruction being given.
exemplos.resposta: This is an example of practical communication using place vocabulary and instructions.

alternativas: talk about familiar spaces in English
exercicios.respostaCorreta: talk about familiar spaces in English
exercicios.explicacao: Knowing place vocabulary supports simple and useful communication about everyday environments.

exercicios.enunciado: Simple instructions are important because they:
alternativas: help students understand and act in routine situations
exercicios.respostaCorreta: help students understand and act in routine situations
exercicios.explicacao: Instructions are part of practical communication in school and daily life.

alternativas: Place words and simple instructions make communication more practical.
This topic has no relation to everyday life.
Students cannot understand simple directions in English.
School vocabulary is not useful in real situations.
exercicios.respostaCorreta: Place words and simple instructions make communication more practical.
exercicios.explicacao: This content connects language learning to real and familiar contexts.

exercicios.enunciado: Studying this topic helps the student:
alternativas: use English in routine spaces and actions with more confidence
avoid all communication in school contexts
exercicios.respostaCorreta: use English in routine spaces and actions with more confidence
exercicios.explicacao: The topic supports functional language use in familiar environments.

simulado.enunciado: The main idea of this topic is that students can:
alternativas: communicate more clearly about places and simple actions in English
simulado.respostaCorreta: communicate more clearly about places and simple actions in English
simulado.explicacao: This content helps students use English in practical, familiar situations.
